N8N_API_KEY.description: Your N8N API Key from localhost

N8N_PUBLIC_URL.description: Your Ngrok public URL (will be set in environment variables)

N8N_WEBHOOK_URL.description: The permanent public webhook URL for your N8N workflow

TRELLO_KEY.description: Your Trello API key for live board access

TRELLO_TOKEN.description: Your Trello API token for live board access

TRELLO_BOARD_ID.description: The Trello board ID used for live dashboard data
